series_metadata.series_title: Application for Wholesale Cigarette Dealers License
series_metadata.series_description: This form, related documents, and charts are used by cigarette wholesalers to apply for an annual license and to calculate any pro-rated fee amount.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 3 yrs after the end of the 12 month period covering the license period or until such time as the diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved for a particular year., Paper: Shred
